Argument Reference

The following arguments are supported:

  • compartment_id - (Required) The OCID of the compartment corresponding to the APM domain.
  • display_name - (Required) (Updatable) Display name of the APM domain.
  • description - (Optional) (Updatable) Description of the APM domain.
  • freeform_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Simple key-value pair that is applied without any predefined name, type, or scope.
  • defined_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Defined tags for this resource. Each key is predefined and scoped to a namespace.
  • is_free_tier - (Optional) Indicates whether this is an Always Free resource.
